programme.title: Our Hillside Moments - EP 7
programme.desc: The cast once again take on the OHM card game, with soul-searching questions that cut deep—some break into tears, others embrace, baring their true feelings. Their final night unfolds at a scenic campsite: a fierce water fight fuels their competitive streak, while dazzling fireworks under the night sky reveal tender hearts—ending Our Hillside Moments on its most unforgettable night.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 17
programme.desc: Two little girls go missing at around the same time. SOD and Detective Wang's team must collaborate to solve the case. Time is of the essence as they fear for the girls' safety. Weiliang's wife and family begin to suspect him. The parents of one of the missing girls are famous influencers, they publicly criticize the police, resulting in SOD being removed from the investigation.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 18
programme.desc: The members of SOD decide to defy orders and conduct their own private investigation. They discover that the series of cases are all connected to Weiliang. Meanwhile, Weiliang's wife can no longer conceal her suspicions and confronts him directly. Weiliang realizes that the police are onto him and goes on the run. The police launch a massive pursuit.

programme.desc: Daily updates on local news headlines and stories.

programme.desc: Guan Zhong holds Renmei hostage to threaten Shanghao. Dali and Kuro arrive in time to drive him off. Kuro explains his real purpose — bringing business — leaving Shanghao and Renmei deeply touched.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 380
programme.desc: Wenxue arrives and overhears Jiansi and Shujun arguing about the bid. Once they leave, she secretly checks Jiansil’s tender documents.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 381
programme.desc: Jiansi and Yue-li begin the bidding as scheduled. Tianyou rushes in to submit his bid. Jialiang, realizing he caught the wrong man, is dragged to the venue by Dali and Kuro.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Super Taste - 2 Days 1 Night Go S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: This series will bring viewers in search of more interesting food dishes in places like Phuket, Bangkok, Jiayi, Taipei, Okinawa and Taoyuan.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 1
programme.desc: The war in the Middle East has wreaked massive havoc in travellers’ plans. Frontline speaks to one returning Singaporean who was supposed to work in Dubai but has now decided to embark on a new journey in Singapore. How have Singaporeans’ travel plans changed? Some tourists flew across the world just to see the Merlion—only to find it wrapped in scaffolding. Why? Watch to find out how Singapore keeps its iconic statue spotless.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 7
programme.desc: Guo Ying finds Li Na on the yacht and asks her where Wen Guang is. Li Na says she does not know and lies about how Wen Guang had killed someone for her. Guo Ying's guard is let down, and Li Na takes the opportunity to poison her and escape. As the poison starts to take effect, Zhi Ming does his best to escort Guo Ying back on land for treatment despite being poisoned himself.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 8
programme.desc: Guo Ying receives tip off about important evidence for an arms smuggling case. Finding it suspicious, she reports to Wu Sir, who deploys Ying Jie and a few other CID personnel to investigate. In the house, Ying Jie finds a microchip and hides it. As Ying Jie was going to check the microchip data, Guo Ying appears. She realises her father, Yao Kang, is the mole in the police force.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 13
programme.desc: A foreign worker who once helped Wei Ren fix his computer is moving house. Wei Ren and Ting Xuan offer to help him. While helping him, they start to develop some feelings for each other. As they come into physical contact, their hearts start beating quickly, and they suspect they have fallen for each other. Upon reaching home, they are unable to sleep well as the memories of them spending time with each other replay in their minds.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 14
programme.desc: Yan Xun gifts a new bracelet to Xi Yue, but Xi Yue is not elated upon receiving it. She feels that the old bracelet has too much meaning to her, and that its importance cannot be replaced by the new bracelet. Yan Xun does not understand why Xi Yue is so stubborn, and the two of them argue. In a fit of anger, Xi Yue runs downstairs and flings the bracelet away. After the incident, she regrets doing so and wants to find the bracelet back, but her search for it is in vain.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 1
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.desc: The war in the Middle East has wreaked massive havoc in travellers’ plans. Frontline speaks to one returning Singaporean who was supposed to work in Dubai but has now decided to embark on a new journey in Singapore. How have Singaporeans’ travel plans changed? Some tourists flew across the world just to see the Merlion—only to find it wrapped in scaffolding. Why? Watch to find out how Singapore keeps its iconic statue spotless.

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 18
programme.desc: Nick suddenly turns the car around and tries to knock Y over. Despite seeing the oncoming car, Y stays still. They both swerve away at the last second, narrowly avoiding a collision. After checking on Nick, Jane finds Y, who’s crashed into the bushes. He’s unconscious but looks unhurt. Nick thinks Y is feigning injury and asks Jane to leave, but she insists on staying until the ambulance arrives.

"Crab Roe Noodles" are available for RMB10, and Omakase containing sea urchin can be tasted for RMB200, which is equally attractive.

Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Jealousy
programme.desc: Inspector Bruhl is investigating the abduction of a young boy from a playground, until evidence suggests that the boy doesn’t exist at all. Is he a figment of the alleged mother’s fractured reality, or are answers buried in her traumatic past?

programme.title: Almost Entirely A Slight Disaster
programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: Run Up!
programme.desc: After a life-altering accident shatters her dreams, Elodie, a young hiker turned paraplegic, discovers the power of wheelchair sports. With the help of her trainer Isabelle, she is able to awaken from her lethargy and recognize true victories in life.

programme.title: Free Money
programme.desc: Based on true stories of the crypto and investment craze of the early 2020-ies. Crypto's allure, wealth's pursuit, and the lessons of a changing financial world collide in an intense journey of three interconnected lives - an unwitting Bitcoin holder, a crypto entrepreneur and a conservative banker.

programme.title: Open Door
programme.desc: Rudina embarks on a road trip with her pregnant sister Elma back to their Albanian hometown. However, Elma is unmarried, and they need to find someone to play the part of her husband in order not to anger their traditional father.

programme.title: Nick-Off Duty
programme.desc: When Lenny sets off on a mission to avenge her mother’s murder, she finds herself in trouble with the Russian mob and an underground organ harvesting ring. Her father, Hamburg cop Nick and his partner must race against the clock to rescue her.

programme.title: Cash On Delivery
programme.desc: This tale depicts the pain, prejudice, and guilt of a young man who is filled with fear and doubt about apples and the apple bearers because of a past incident in which he brutalizes his partner due to an apple-related event.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: The Little Comrade
programme.desc: During Stalinist tyranny, 6-year-old Leelo’s mother is sent to a prison camp. Haunted by her mother’s last words telling her to be a good kid, Leelo vows to be on her best behaviour in the hope that it will bring her mother back.

It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Sleek and durable, its 10-layer titanium Protectal® non-stick coating keeps even heavily seasoned dishes from sticking or burning. Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar® base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos Shuttle Chef Thermal Cooker
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later 节能无火焖烧锅，保持食物营养, 早上轻松准备，晚上即可享用热食

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Electronic Nerve Stimulator
programme.desc: Compact & intuitive design massager that allows you to treat specific pain areas wherever you are. 微电流电疗结合热敷功能，帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手，哪里痛就贴哪里！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot Opula Lite 4 Wheels Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: The most sleek lightweight 18kg four-wheel mobility scooter that is foldable and for overseas traveling. 18公斤四轮电动代步车，时尚轻巧可折叠，方便带出国！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Dampness & Blood supplement
programme.desc: Kampo Blood Clean Supplement combines traditional herbal wisdom with modern wellness needs. Helps normalize blood pressure, blood sugar, and cholesterol levels. Helps to promote clear, flexible, and elastic blood vessels, reducing stroke risk. Kampo Anti-dampness capsules help remove excess dampness from the body and balance internal energy for optimal health. Helps eliminate edema and reduce water retention. 日本制造。融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技，严选中药及草本植物精华，配方温和纯净，天然无添加。有助于调节血压、血糖和胆固醇水平。有助于促进血管通畅、柔韧有弹性。日本制造，有助于清除体内湿气。平衡内气，促进健康。帮助消除水肿，减少水肿。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Epitex Pillow Bundle
programme.desc: Epitex Brace Contour Pillow is made from dermatological-grade elastomer polymers, molded into a unique grid-like structure that provides unparalleled support while reducing pressure on your head and neck by minimizing surface tension. Epitex Brace Contour Pillow由皮肤科级弹性硅胶制成，提供卓越支撑，有效吸收头颈压力。独特网格设计带来强支撑力和回弹性，同时减少对面部皮肤的挤压。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Ticket Pottaachu - EP 9
programme.desc: Pestle and Mortar dives into the immersive experience of preparing staples in the most authentic means possible, a culinary experience like never before.
